case_title: GABRIELLE HEARN-PROIETTI et al VS. THE COMSTOCK APARTMENT CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEARN-PROIETTI, GABRIEL HEARN, ROCKFORD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE COMSTOCK APARTMENT CORPORATION $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,620.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY FOR THE VALUE OF THE SUBJECT VEHICLE, AND ALLOCATION FOR LOSS OF USE. DEFENDANT COMSTOCK VALET IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF HEARN, ROCKFORD
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT-
